title: Watch: US strikes Iran's Qom turbine engine production plant; before-after images reveal scale of damage
summary_full: US Central Command released images showing the destruction of an Iranian facility producing drone and aircraft components following American airstrikes. This action occurs amidst the ongoing US-Israel and Iran conflict. French President Macron discussed strengthening Saudi air defenses and urged Iran to restore freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz.
